help.title: 📖 Operations Manual - GameBot
help.set_canal: **/set_canal** - Set the channel where the bot will send news

about.description:
Bot for game news and trailers.
Collects info from RSS, YouTube, and official sites, translates to your language, and posts to configured channels.
about.footer: Game news and trailers on your Discord.

set_canal.success_changed:
✅ Channel configured successfully!

**Previous channel:** <#{old}>
**Current channel:** <#{new}>

Next news will be sent to this channel.
set_canal.success_new:
✅ Channel configured successfully!

**Channel:** <#{channel}>

News will be sent to this channel.
set_canal.error_permission:
❌ The bot doesn't have permission to send messages in channel <#{channel}>!
Please grant **Send Messages** permission to the bot.
set_canal.error_embed:
⚠️ The bot doesn't have permission to send embeds in channel <#{channel}>.
News may not display correctly. Consider granting **Embed Links** permission.
set_canal.error_text_channel: ❌ The channel must be a text channel!
set_canal.error_admin: ❌ You need **Administrator** permission to use this command.

forcecheck.error_admin: ❌ You need **Administrator** permission to use this command.

clean_state.description: Clean parts of state.json with automatic backup
clean_state.error_admin: ❌ You need **Administrator** permission to use this command.
clean_state.error_no_backup: ❌ Failed to create backup. Cleanup cancelled for safety.
clean_state.error_empty: ⚠️ state.json is empty or does not exist.

scanner.no_guilds: ⚠️ No guilds configured with 'channel_id'. Use /set_canal or /dashboard to configure.
